data.name: Femdom Overtime
data.detailed_description:
You work a boring and tiring office job that drains you physically and mentally. On the surface, there are no upsides to your job, but secretly, you and your big-breasted co-worker, Nanami, get together at the end of every shift to relieve your pent-up stress. Nanami is a cruel sadist, and after each shift, the two of you meet in the empty storage shed where she torments you, but you love it because you are a huge masochist.

Experience a day with Nanami, your big-breasted, sadistic co-worker who loves tormenting and bullying you.

Features:

  • ~1.5K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 20 Unique animated character images

  • 22 Total images

  • A gallery featuring all animations in the game
data.about_the_game:

Nanami is a cruel sadist, and after each shift, the two of you meet in the empty storage shed where she torments you, but you love it because you are a huge masochist.

Experience a day with Nanami, your big-breasted, sadistic co-worker who loves tormenting and bullying you.

Features:

data.short_description: A femdom story where you spend a day with Nanami, your big-breasted, sadistic co-worker, brought to life with fully animated NSFW scenes.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文, 印地語

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
